bird.name: 侏穗鹛
bird.summary: 侏穗鹛（学名：Dasycrotapha plateni），是繡眼鳥科侏穗鹛属的一种，過去曾歸類於画眉科穗鹛属，为菲律宾的特有种。 特徵 侏穗鹛的平均体重约为8.7克。栖息地包括亚热带或热带的湿润低地林和亚热带或热带严重退化的前森林。

locations.name: 阿波火山
locations.summary: 阿波火山（他加祿語：Bundok Apo）是一座位于菲律宾棉兰老岛东南部的活火山，海拔2,954公尺，为菲律宾最高峰。达沃市位于其东北方30公里处。近百年未喷发，有硫磺矿，覆盖着热带硬木林。 主峰及周围已经开辟为阿波火山国家公园（面积80…

locations.name: Mount Kitanglad
locations.summary: Mount Kitanglad is an inactive volcano located in the Kitanglad Mountain Range in Bukidnon province on Mindanao island.

relations.subject: 侏穗鹛
relations.evidence: It occurs in some protected areas like Pasonanca Natural Park, Mount Matutum, Mount Apo and Mount Kitanglad but despite this actual protection and enforcement against illegal logging are lax

relations.subject: 侏穗鹛
relations.evidence: It is often seen in mixed flocks with other forest birds. It has been classified by the IUCN as Near-threatened due to habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 侏穗鹛
relations.evidence: It is seen on the undergrowth of primary forests or along forest edge where it is uncommon across its range. The International Union for Conservation of Nature has assessed this species as near-threatened with the population decreasing due to the deforestation of its preferred lowland forest
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
